nodes.name: Black-hooded sierra finch
nodes.summary: The black-hooded sierra finch (Phrygilus atriceps) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in Argentina, Bolivia, Chile, and Peru. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist montane forests and subtropical or tropical high-altitude shrubland. References

nodes.name: Black-hooded sierra finch
nodes.summary: Black-hooded sierra finch（Phrygilus atriceps）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Black-hooded sierra finch。

nodes.name: Phrygilus
nodes.summary: Phrygilus（Phrygilus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联4种鸟类，如Black-hooded sierra finch、Peruvian sierra finch、Grey-hooded sierra finch等4种鸟类。
